---
title: "Cloud Compare"
id: materialspat-analysis-6
order: 145
summary: "3D point cloud and mesh processing software."
source_url: "https://www.danielgm.net/cc/"
modules:
  - module-hr-analysis
Goals:
  - module-goals-spat-analysis
activities:
  - activity-analysis-4
  - activity-analysis-5
  - activity-analysis-5
assessments:
  - assessment-spat-analysis
labels:
  - advanced
  - recommended
  - optional
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/spatial_analysis/materialspat-analysis-6.md"
---

Read about CloudCompare:

<https://www.danielgm.net/cc/>

## Connected Module

- [Analysis of high resolution aerial data](../modules/module-hr-analysis.qmd)
